title: Define assistant context contract for all workflow stages
description: Create a canonical context packet used by assistant calls in brief, questionnaire, mapping, table QA, analysis interpretation, and reporting.
acceptance_criteria: Context schema includes project, brief, methodology, selected sections, questionnaire version, mapping version, run metadata
Schema is documented and versioned
Contract tests verify required fields before assistant call execution

title: Define section taxonomy and generation matrix by methodology
description: Normalize section options (e.g., screener, motivations, purchase funnel, outcomes) for all supported methodologies and map to required analysis compatibility rules.
acceptance_criteria: Section matrix covers A&U, Segmentation, Drivers, Concept Monadic, Creative Monadic, Brand Equity Tracker, MaxDiff, TURF
Each section has required fields and validation rules
Matrix is consumable by UI selector and generation engine

title: Define AI-first UI interaction patterns
description: Specify persistent copilot behavior, inline assistant actions, approval checkpoints, and confidence/explanation display patterns.
acceptance_criteria: Global copilot panel behavior defined for every major screen
Critical approval checkpoints documented (publish draft, lock mapping, run analysis, export)
Fallback manual paths documented for each AI-assisted action

title: Define evaluation framework for assistant quality and grounding
description: Create evaluation checklist and tests for grounding, consistency, hallucination resistance, and output usefulness.
acceptance_criteria: Eval scenarios exist for brief grounding, section generation, mapping suggestions, and analysis explanations
Pass/fail thresholds are documented
CI hooks for eval test execution are planned

title: Initialize codebase runtime skeleton and app entry points
description: Set up apps/api, apps/web, packages, services, and local startup scripts with clean dependency boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: API and web stubs run locally
Shared package import paths are stable
Starter tests run in CI/local

title: Implement project workspace with hard isolation boundaries
description: Create project roots and enforce path-level access control to isolate client assets.
acceptance_criteria: Project folders created: Briefs, Questionnaires, Data, Mappings, Runs, Outputs, Logs
Cross-project read/write is rejected at service boundary
Isolation tests cover malicious path traversal attempts

title: Implement global assistant shell in UI
description: Add persistent assistant panel with context chips and stage-aware actions.
acceptance_criteria: Assistant panel visible across all app stages
Context chips display active brief/methodology/versions
Assistant invocation logs include context hash

title: Implement basic event logging and provenance foundation
description: Log user and assistant events with project and artifact references.
acceptance_criteria: Events captured for create/update/upload/run/export actions
Assistant actions include prompt-context metadata
Logs are queryable by project and run

title: Implement research brief ingestion and parsing pipeline
description: Support docx/pdf/md brief upload and extraction into structured fields.
acceptance_criteria: Brief formats docx/pdf/md accepted
Extracted entities include required sections: Background, Research Methodology, Target Audience, Research Objectives, Success Criteria
Users can manually edit extracted values before saving

title: Add brief analyzer assistant mode
description: Assistant summarizes brief, identifies gaps, and proposes assumptions/questions for confirmation.
acceptance_criteria: Assistant output references brief content directly
User can accept/reject each assumption
Accepted assumptions become part of generation context
Assistant can propose section-level edits with before/after diffs and source citations

title: Implement generation preflight gate
description: Block questionnaire generation until minimum brief context is complete.
acceptance_criteria: Preflight checks required fields before generation
UI clearly shows missing requirements
Assistant provides targeted prompts to fill missing context

title: Implement section-by-section brief review editor with AI/manual modes
description: Provide a section navigator and editor so users can review and edit each brief section manually or with AI-assisted edits before questionnaire generation.
acceptance_criteria: Editor shows Background, Research Methodology, Target Audience, Research Objectives, and Success Criteria as separate reviewable sections
Each section supports manual edits, AI rewrite suggestions, and explicit apply/reject actions
Section-level provenance shows source excerpt/citation and change history prior to generation

title: Implement methodology selector with section selector UI
description: Allow user to choose methodology and generate selected sections only.
acceptance_criteria: All supported methodologies are selectable
Section options reflect methodology matrix
Selections persist in draft metadata

title: Implement section-based questionnaire generation engine
description: Generate section outputs grounded in brief context and methodology guidance.
acceptance_criteria: Generation payload includes assistant context contract
Only selected sections are generated
Questionnaire structure conforms to schema and section order

title: Implement section-level AI edit/regenerate workflow
description: Support targeted rewrite/regenerate actions per section with deterministic change tracking.
acceptance_criteria: Users can regenerate one section without replacing others
Assistant explains what changed and why
Changes are versioned with diff metadata

title: Implement questionnaire versioning and compare view
description: Track versions with author, timestamp, context hash, and section-level diffs.
acceptance_criteria: Versions v1..vn are persisted
Compare view shows section-level additions/removals/edits
Users can revert or fork from prior version

title: Implement questionnaire validation engine
description: Run methodology and analysis compatibility checks before publish/export.
acceptance_criteria: Validation reports include section/question references
Blocking issues prevent publish/export
Validation aligns with analysis prerequisites

title: Add assistant fix workflow for validation issues
description: Assistant proposes targeted repairs and applies user-approved fixes.
acceptance_criteria: Fix suggestions map to specific validation failures
User can accept fixes individually
Re-validation runs automatically after applied fixes

title: Implement DOCX export
description: Export current approved questionnaire version to styled DOCX.
acceptance_criteria: DOCX export generated from selected version
Includes section headers, IDs, logic notes
Export artifact stored in project Outputs with provenance

title: Implement Decipher-ready structured export
description: Export questionnaire to Decipher-ready structured output format.
acceptance_criteria: Structured output includes questions, options, logic, IDs
Internal schema checks pass
Export artifact stored with questionnaire/version linkage

title: Implement data upload and profiling
description: Upload CSV/XLSX up to 250MB and compute structural profile.
acceptance_criteria: Files up to 250MB upload successfully
Profile includes row count, columns, missingness summary
File metadata and hash are persisted

title: Implement auto-mapping engine and editable mapping UI
description: Suggest questionnaire-to-data mapping and allow edits to variables, scales, segments, labels.
acceptance_criteria: Auto-map produced from questionnaire + data profile
Users can edit and save mapping versions
Mapping is linked to questionnaire version and data file hash

title: Add mapping copilot with confidence explanations
description: Assistant explains low-confidence mappings and proposes fixes with rationale.
acceptance_criteria: Confidence signals shown per mapped field
Assistant can suggest and apply mapping corrections
All accepted changes are versioned

title: Implement core table generation pipeline
description: Generate frequency, multi-select, T2B, mean, and segment crosstab outputs from mapping config.
acceptance_criteria: Core tables generate from saved mapping without manual edits
Significance toggle is configurable
Output artifacts stored under run folder

title: Add table QA checks
description: Run table QA checks for base-size thresholds, missing values, and suspicious distributions.
acceptance_criteria: QA checks run automatically after table generation
Findings include severity and remediation hint
QA report is attached to run artifacts

title: Add table QA copilot
description: Assistant explains QA findings and suggests next corrective steps.
acceptance_criteria: Assistant explanations reference QA report fields
Suggested actions are executable from UI
User decisions are logged

title: Implement analysis run orchestrator
description: Launch analyses asynchronously with status tracking and run metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Statuses: queued/running/failed/completed
Run metadata includes input and config versions
Failure messages are actionable

title: Implement Drivers suite (ridge/logistic, Pearson, weighted-effects)
description: Produce unified drivers package and intermediate artifacts for interpretation.
acceptance_criteria: Ridge/logistic outputs generated
Pearson outputs generated
Weighted-effects outputs generated

title: Implement Segmentation suite (VarClus + KMeans + profiles)
description: Run segmentation pipeline and generate profile summaries.
acceptance_criteria: VarClus outputs generated
KMeans outputs generated
Profile tables generated for each segment

title: Implement MaxDiff + TURF suite
description: Support MaxDiff estimation and TURF reach analysis with exportable artifacts.
acceptance_criteria: MaxDiff outputs generated
TURF outputs generated
Results linked to run provenance

title: Implement insight copilot with evidence-bound explanations
description: Assistant generates narratives for tables/analyses and links statements to underlying outputs.
acceptance_criteria: Insights include trace links to output rows/metrics
No unsupported numeric claims in narrative
Users can toggle plain-language vs analyst-depth mode

title: Implement run comparison and change diagnostics
description: Compare two runs and explain differences in inputs, mapping, and output metrics.
acceptance_criteria: Run diff view shows input/config/version changes
Key metric deltas are computed and displayed
Assistant can explain likely causes of major deltas

title: Complete E2E test harness and UAT checklist
description: Automate core journey tests and produce UAT checklist for MVP release readiness.
acceptance_criteria: E2E tests cover brief->questionnaire->mapping->tables->analysis->exports
Known failure paths are tested
UAT checklist passes for all in-scope methodologies

title: Implement custom data cuts specification and execution layer
description: Allow users to define and save custom cuts (filters, segments, banners) and execute them on mapped survey data and analysis outputs.
acceptance_criteria: Users can create, edit, and save named data cuts tied to project + mapping version
Cuts execute against generated tables and KMeans profile outputs without manual code changes
Cut definitions are versioned and auditable in run metadata

title: Add AI copilot for custom cut generation and refinement
description: Enable users to request custom cuts in plain language and have the assistant propose executable cut definitions with rationale.
acceptance_criteria: Assistant can generate cut definitions from natural language prompts
Each suggested cut includes confidence and explainability metadata before apply
Users can approve/edit/reject suggested cuts and all actions are logged

title: Implement strategic summary generator and export
description: Generate executive-ready strategic findings summaries from analysis outputs and custom cuts, with exportable artifacts.
acceptance_criteria: Summary includes key findings, implications, and recommended actions grounded in output evidence
Exports support at least Markdown and DOCX for stakeholder-ready deliverables
Every narrative claim links to run/cut/table provenance metadata

title: Create guided MVP journey mode (project -> brief -> survey -> data -> analysis -> summary)
description: Add a guided workflow mode that stitches the full end-to-end process into a single user journey optimized for MVP demos and onboarding.
acceptance_criteria: Users can complete the full journey from project setup through summary export in one guided flow
UI shows stage progression, blockers, and next actions with assistant help at each step
Flow supports resume-from-last-step behavior and state recovery

title: Add 5-worker concurrent MVP reliability test pack
description: Validate that five simultaneous users on separate projects can complete the MVP flow without data leakage, lock conflicts, or run failures.
acceptance_criteria: Concurrency suite simulates 5 active users across isolated projects
No cross-project artifact access occurs under concurrent load
API latency/error thresholds and run completion rates meet MVP reliability targets

title: Migrate coordinator and app state from SQLite to PostgreSQL
description: Move sprint coordination, project metadata, and run state to PostgreSQL for reliable concurrent access across multiple users and services.
acceptance_criteria: All runtime state currently stored in SQLite is migrated to PostgreSQL with parity checks
Connection pooling and transaction boundaries are implemented for API and worker services
Load test confirms concurrent read/write behavior for at least 7 active users

title: Implement authentication, RBAC, and project-level authorization
description: Add secure login and role-based access controls with strict project-level permissions for internal team collaboration.
acceptance_criteria: Roles include at minimum admin, researcher, and reviewer
Every project artifact endpoint enforces project membership and role checks
Audit logs capture actor, action, project, and artifact references for security-sensitive operations
Admin-only users can access cost reporting without requiring analysis execution permissions

title: Add queue-backed asynchronous execution for heavy jobs
description: Run table generation and advanced analyses through a job queue and worker pool to prevent API blocking and improve reliability under concurrency.
acceptance_criteria: Long-running analyses execute in workers with retry and timeout policies
Job states are persisted and visible in UI as queued/running/failed/completed
Dead-letter flow exists for repeated failures with actionable diagnostics

title: Implement optimistic locking and conflict resolution for shared edits
description: Prevent silent overwrites when multiple users edit questionnaire, mapping, and analysis config artifacts simultaneously.
acceptance_criteria: Version tokens are required on update operations for editable artifacts
Conflicts return explicit responses with merge/retry guidance in UI
Automated tests cover simultaneous edit collisions for questionnaire and mapping entities

title: Harden project data isolation and storage boundaries
description: Enforce strict per-project storage boundaries for uploaded data, outputs, and logs to protect client confidentiality across concurrent teams.
acceptance_criteria: Service-layer checks reject cross-project path and object access attempts
All stored artifacts are tagged with project ownership metadata
Security tests include traversal and cross-project access attack scenarios

title: Add idempotency keys and duplicate-run protection
description: Prevent duplicate analysis, export, and job submissions caused by retries, refreshes, or race conditions.
acceptance_criteria: Create/run/export endpoints accept idempotency keys and return stable results for repeated requests
Duplicate job creation is blocked at database and service levels
Tests validate idempotent behavior under concurrent request bursts

title: Implement migrations, backup/restore, and disaster recovery checks
description: Standardize schema migrations and operational resilience workflows for safe releases and recoverability.
acceptance_criteria: Alembic (or equivalent) migration workflow is required in CI before deploy
Automated backup and restore procedures are documented and tested
Recovery drill demonstrates successful restore of project and run metadata

title: Add observability, SLO dashboards, and concurrency regression suite
description: Instrument APIs/workers with structured telemetry and establish regression tests for multi-user reliability and maintainability.
acceptance_criteria: Structured logs include request_id, project_id, user_id, run_id, and correlation IDs
Dashboards track latency, job success rate, queue depth, and error rate against defined SLOs
Automated concurrency suite simulates 5-7 users across separate projects and passes in CI

title: Establish architecture decision record discipline
description: Create and enforce an ADR process so key technical decisions are documented, reviewed, and versioned over time.
acceptance_criteria: ADR template and contribution rules are published in docs
CI check ensures new major architecture changes include ADR references
At least initial ADRs exist for storage, analysis runtime, auth, and assistant orchestration

title: Define plugin contract for analysis methodologies
description: Standardize interfaces for registering and executing methodology modules so new analyses can be added safely without core rewrites.
acceptance_criteria: Common analysis plugin interface is documented and type-checked
Existing methodologies implement or adapt to the interface contract
New methodology smoke test can be added with minimal boilerplate

title: Create golden datasets and expected outputs per methodology
description: Add fixed test fixtures and expected analysis outputs to detect regressions across all supported quantitative methods.
acceptance_criteria: Golden fixtures exist for A&U, Segmentation, Drivers, Concept, Creative, Brand Tracker, MaxDiff, and TURF
Regression tests compare current output against expected tolerances
Fixture update workflow is documented and controlled

title: Add CI quality gates and repository standards
description: Enforce tests, linting, type checks, migration checks, and coverage thresholds on every pull request.
acceptance_criteria: PRs require passing unit/integration tests, lint, and type checks
Schema/migration checks run automatically in CI
Branch protections require all checks before merge

title: Version APIs and enforce schema compatibility testing
description: Introduce explicit API/schema versioning and compatibility tests to prevent accidental breaking changes across services and clients.
acceptance_criteria: Versioning policy is documented for API and shared contracts
Compatibility tests validate backward support for supported versions
Breaking changes require explicit migration notes and version bump

title: Publish runbooks and onboarding playbooks
description: Create practical documentation for setup, local development, debugging, deployment, rollback, and incident handling.
acceptance_criteria: New engineer can set up and run core workflows using docs only
Operational runbooks cover common failure scenarios and recovery steps
Docs include ownership and escalation paths

title: Implement dependency and upgrade management policy
description: Add scheduled dependency maintenance, vulnerability checks, and controlled upgrade workflows to reduce long-term tech debt.
acceptance_criteria: Dependency update cadence is defined and automated where practical
Security scanning runs in CI with actionable reporting
Upgrade checklist includes compatibility testing and rollback notes

title: Standardize release process and rollback strategy
description: Define repeatable release, versioning, and rollback procedures for safe production changes and incident response.
acceptance_criteria: Release checklist is documented and used for each deploy
Semantic versioning and changelog process are enforced
Rollback procedure is validated in a drill and documented with timings

title: Build operations dashboard for API health, job health, and cost
description: Create a unified dashboard covering API reliability, background job performance, LLM/token spend, and infrastructure cost trends by project.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard includes API uptime, error rate, latency percentiles, and dependency health status
Dashboard includes queue depth, job success/failure/retry rates, and stuck job indicators
Dashboard includes token usage and cost by workflow stage, project, and timeframe
Dashboard includes total portfolio cost and rolling average cost metrics (per project, per run, per deliverable)

title: Define SLOs and alerting for reliability and spend anomalies
description: Set explicit service-level objectives and alert thresholds for latency, error rate, queue delays, failed jobs, and unexpected cost spikes.
acceptance_criteria: SLOs are documented for API availability, latency, and analysis run completion time
Alerts route to owners for threshold breaches and sustained degradations
Cost anomaly alerts are configured for sudden increases in token or compute spend

title: Add data quality and output integrity monitoring
description: Track mapping quality, validation failures, QA findings, and output drift to detect silent regressions in research quality.
acceptance_criteria: Monitoring reports mapping confidence distribution and low-confidence concentration by project
Validation and QA findings are trended by severity and methodology
Output drift checks compare current runs against golden baselines with alerting on major deviation

title: Implement capacity and quota controls
description: Protect reliability under concurrent usage with per-project quotas, concurrency caps, and graceful degradation controls.
acceptance_criteria: Per-project and per-user limits exist for concurrent runs, upload volume, and expensive analysis requests
System enforces backpressure and clear user messaging when limits are reached
Capacity reports show saturation risk and planning signals for scaling

title: Add Railway/Vercel deployment profile for MVP path
description: Prepare deployment-ready configs and runbooks for API/worker/data services on Railway and frontend on Vercel aligned to the guided MVP journey.
acceptance_criteria: Deployment configs exist for Railway services and Vercel frontend with environment separation
CI/CD pipeline can deploy the guided MVP flow with health checks and rollback path
Operational runbook includes scaling guidance for 5-7 concurrent internal users

title: Implement admin cost reporting by project and portfolio
description: Deliver cost reporting views and exports for admin stakeholders who need financial oversight without analysis execution access.
acceptance_criteria: Admin reporting includes project-level API/token/compute/storage cost breakdowns with date filters
Admin reporting includes total cost across all projects and month-to-date/quarter-to-date summaries
Report views and exports are accessible to admin role and restricted from non-authorized users

title: Add benchmarked average cost metrics for proposals and RFP responses
description: Create reusable benchmark metrics so commercial teams can estimate effort and expected API cost for new scopes.
acceptance_criteria: System computes average cost per project, per methodology, and per major workflow stage
Benchmark table supports configurable lookback windows and excludes flagged outlier projects
Exportable benchmark summary is available for proposal/RFP packaging with source period and sample size metadata
